hero_desc: AI assistant that answers every call, books appointments, and sounds like a real person — set up for you in 48 hours.
problem_title:
While you work,

the phone rings unanswered.
problem_desc: Most businesses lose 20–40% of calls because they simply can't pick up. Every missed call is a lost customer.
problem_stat_1: of callers hang up if nobody answers within 3 rings

features_title: What you get with AI reception
features_subtitle: Not just booking — a complete assistant that knows your business
features_booking_desc: Appointments directly into your calendar. No double bookings.
features_knowledge_desc: Answers questions about your services, pricing, and availability.
features_availability_desc: Never sleeps, always picks up. Even on weekends and holidays.
features_multilingual_desc: Slovak, Czech, English and more to choose from.
features_analytics_desc: Overview of all calls, conversions, and trends.
how_desc: No complicated software. We set up a complete turnkey system — you just watch your calendar fill up.
wf2_msg_ai1: Hello, when would work for you?

cta_desc: Free consultation. We'll show you how much revenue you're losing — and how to stop it.
